title: The Survival Game Tightens
description: Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Enel, Zoro, Nami. Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: By the way... are you feeling okay?

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Where are you going, strange knight!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sorry. I will be chasing after enel!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That is why I apologized to you!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I said wait!! You insensitive old man!!!

summary: Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.
